Name: PHYSICS_TEXTURE_PARAM
Description: Defines physically-based rendering (PBR) texture properties such as refraction, reflectance, and surface roughness.

Fields.Name: Layer Type
Fields.Description: Defines the material or rendering layer type used for physics-based shading.

Fields.Name: Refractive Index (Real Part)
Fields.Description: Real component of the refractive index used for light bending calculations.

Fields.Name: Refractive Index (Imaginary Part)
Fields.Description: Imaginary component of the refractive index representing absorption or attenuation of light.

Fields.Name: Normal Reflectance
Fields.Description: Reflectance value at normal incidence used in Fresnel equations.

Fields.Name: Normal Reflectance (Int Scale)
Fields.Description: Same as normal reflectance but stored using an 8-bit (0–255) scale.

Fields.Name: Roughness
Fields.Description: Controls surface microfacet roughness affecting light scattering and blur.

Fields.Name: Roughness (Int Scale)
Fields.Description: Roughness value represented on an 8-bit (0–255) scale.
